case_title: ROCIO SUSANA MEDRANO VS. FRANK ARTHUR FERRIS

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT FRANK FARRIS' DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF ROCIO MEDRANO IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE "CAUSING TO BE SERVED" DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL KOWLEDGE OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT FRANK FARRIS' Demurrer To THE Complaint Of Plaintiff Rocio Medrano IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE "CAUSING TO BE SERVED" DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL KOWLEDGE OF SERVICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
